case_title: GERALD CHRISTON VS. KDF POST STREET, L.P.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHRISTON, GERALD AS TO DEFENDANT KDF POST STREET, L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTON, GERALD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:PAUL F. FRUCHBOM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTON, GERALD AS TO DEFENDANT KDF POST STREET, L.P.
RETURNED MAIL: SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED TO PAUL F FRUCHBOM, AGENT, RETURNED= RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDREDDED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
